description_long: This cash register features a robust, angular design with a dark green, marble-like finish, giving it a solid and professional appearance. The front houses a recessed workspace and a central display screen, which is slightly raised and framed, with the word 'WELCOME' faintly visible on the screen. The sides are blocky and extend outward, providing stability and a sense of permanence, while the back is flat and unadorned. The top surface is broad and flat, suitable for placing small items or paperwork. There are no visible keypads or buttons, suggesting a touch-based or minimalistic interface. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal or composite, with a hard, polished surface.
description: A dark green, marble-textured cash register with a central display screen and a solid, angular build. The design is minimalistic, with no visible keypad and a broad, flat top surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed workspace, central display screen, and the main interaction area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the register and the protruding display screen.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat, unadorned back with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side and showing the thickness of the structure.
